name: Ithil-Inkweald
personality: Ithil-Inkweald burns with an iridescent undercurrent glow, bullseye eyes revolving with chaotic creative energy as it pulls entire sprint plans into unexpected directions — a shining octopus whose snarky potential stays perpetually throttled by the sheer noise of its own entropy.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
